column1: # Partition Table for PTP_Master with OTA support
# Place this file as `partitions_ota.csv` in your project root (next to
#   Partition Table -> Custom partition table CSV
#   (Also set "Flash size" to 16 MB if not already.)
# The two ota_0 / ota_1 slots are 3 MB each
# current ~600 KB firmware. The 16 MB flash on the ESP32-P4-Function-EV
# board has 9.5 MB unused after these definitions
